input: user-item interactions, news content, user-entity relations, user interaction sequences
output: ranked list of news articles per user
backbone: Hierarchical Contextual Graph-Transformer Network (HCGTN) combining BERT, GNN, and Transformer
loss: multi-objective ranking loss (accuracy, diversity, long-term engagement)
key_idea: interweave BERT for semantic content, GNN for relational structure, and Transformer for sequential behavior, optimized with a multi-objective loss
datasets: standard news recommendation datasets (e.g., MIND, Adressa)
